hero.subtitle: Booh, the definitive business OS for

bentoGrid.title: Friction is the enemy. We've eliminated it.

crm.title: CRM Connect
crm.desc: Your clients in your pocket, everywhere.

features.title: Agenda
features.problem: You have no visibility. You're at the mercy of your schedule.
features.solution: Booh synchronizes, organizes and confirms your appointments automatically.
features.result: Your schedule becomes fluid. Predictable. Healthy.

features.title: Invoicing
features.pain: Forgotten invoices, manual follow-ups, uncertain cash flow…
features.problem: Time spent following up could be used to sell.
features.solution: Booh generates, sends and follows up on your invoices automatically.
features.result: You get paid faster. Your cash flow breathes.

features.title: Stock
features.pain: Unpredictable shortages, manual counts, costly overstocking…
features.painSubtitle: You never know where you stand.
features.problem: Every shortage costs you a customer. Every surplus costs you money.
features.solution: Booh tracks your stock in real-time and anticipates needs.
features.result: Zero shortages. Zero surplus. Optimal stock.

features.title: CRM
features.pain: Lost cards, scattered contacts, untraceable history…
features.painSubtitle: Your network sleeps in your pockets.
features.problem: You forget to follow up. You lose opportunities.
features.solution: Booh digitizes, centralizes and activates your network automatically.
features.result: Every contact becomes a tracked opportunity.

features.title: Identity
features.pain: Expensive printing, outdated cards, laborious sharing…
features.painSubtitle: Your image suffers from an obsolete medium.
features.problem: Your paper cards end up in the trash. Your info is never up to date.
features.solution: Booh creates your interactive digital card, always updated.
features.result: You share your identity in one tap. Memorable.

features.title: Commerce
features.pain: Missed orders, scattered management, impatient customers…
features.problem: No online store = no automatic sales.
features.solution: Booh creates your store and manages orders and payments 24/7.

features.title: Portfolio
features.pain: Disorganized photos, amateur presentation, limited impact…
features.painSubtitle: Your talent deserves better than a photo album.
features.problem: Your prospects don't see the value of your work.
features.solution: Booh transforms your achievements into an immersive and convincing showroom.

features.title: Analytics
features.pain: Blind decisions, untraceable KPIs, uncertain growth…
features.problem: You don't know what works or where to invest.
features.solution: Booh analyzes your activity and guides you towards growth.

features.title: Geolocated Map
features.desc: Discover businesses, products and services near you.
features.pain: Hard to find businesses and services near you. Tedious search, scattered information…
features.painSubtitle: You waste time looking for what you need.
features.problem: How to quickly discover products and services available around you?
features.solution: Booh automatically geolocates all businesses, products and services nearby. Discover, compare, buy in one click.
features.result: Instantly find what you're looking for. At your fingertips.

items.name: Marie K.
items.text: Booh isn't a tool, it's an extension of my brain.

items.name: Aïcha B.
items.text: Finally a business app that respects the user.

items.name: Jean-Marc
items.text: Revenue +30% just by organizing my follow-ups better.

items.q: Is it really free at the start?
items.a: Yes, 30 full days without a credit card.
Yes, automatic synchronization when network returns.

calculator.title: Calculate your time savings
calculator.subtitle: Discover how many hours you'll save each week
calculator.note: * Based on 52 active weeks and an estimated hourly rate of 5,000 FCFA.
